data.label: Rising before Sun
data.description: The astrological body rises before the Sun, making morning visibility possible in the eastern sky before dawn and before sunlight overwhelms the body.
data.runtime_usage: Base condition for heliacal rising, morning-star qualification, solar visibility recovery, and rules that compare body rise time with Sun rise time.

data.label: Setting after Sun
data.description: The astrological body sets after the Sun, making evening visibility possible in the western sky after sunset and before the body becomes too close to the Sun to observe.
data.runtime_usage: Base condition for evening visibility, evening-star qualification, evening heliacal setting, and rules that compare body set time with Sun set time.
